The infamous '''Spacestation 1138''' was a high-security [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] maintained by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] in the [[Karthakk system]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Layout==
[[Space station/Legends|Spacestation]] 1138 consisted of a central shaft flanked by two twin pylons that rotated around the station. On the ends of each pylon were heavy [[capital ship turret]]s, with smaller anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] located along the length of the defense pylons. A [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighter]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay was located towards the top of the station, though larger [[Starship/Legends|starships]] were accommodated with [[Docking tube/Legends|docking tubes]] on the outer pylons. On the flat surfaces of the pylons were also a pair of [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]] doors, which connected to the inner corridors of the station.

==History==
The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Chief/Legends|chief]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] and his [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Revenant]] forces staged an assault against Station 1138 to save [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Orsai]] and his [[Gender/Legends|men]]. [[Jinkins]] transmitted codes that unlocked Orsai's [[Prison/Legends|prison]], and the Captain's men quickly stormed the onboard armory to procure weapons. Blasting their way through [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] guards and past cowardly [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] support staff, the [[Mere Resistance]] [[Troop/Legends|troops]] made their way to a rendezvous with the [[Liberator (Mere)|''Liberator'']].

==Behind the scenes==
Spacestation 1138 is one of many [[1138 (easter egg)|references]] throughout ''Star Wars'' media to [[George Lucas]]' first feature film, ''THX-1138''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
